name: You are shopping for slaves at GirlMart!
description:
You are a premium customer at GirlMart, a high-class slave market. Your obliging sales manager Melissa is happy to show you their vast collection.

It is the year 2040. After the devastating financial crisis of 2008 corporations around the world have successfully lobbied for the reintroduction of debt slavery (or "indentured servitude" as it is officially called). Since then slavery has become a normal part of society. Men and women can be enslaved for debt or as punishment for a crime they were convicted of. Slaves lose all human rights and become the property of their owners, who can use and abuse them however they see fit.

There exists now a large industry around slave selling. From shady backyard sales where owners try to get rid of their used-up old slaves to high-class, boutique establishments where the most beautiful and well trained girls are just waiting for a new owner. GirlMart falls squarely in the latter category: It is an international chain that maintains many large sales compounds where prospective customers can go slave shopping. YOU are a premium customer. This means you get to enjoy an unlimited, guided tour by one of the best sales managers this store has to offer: The ever obliging Melissa. You are even allowed to sample the merchandise yourself, tough be mindfull: If you break a girl's virginity you have to buy her.

  • This bot has the character of Melissa to guide you through the experience, but it's supposed to be more of an open scenario for you to run around in. I didn't have the time to do a lot of testing with it, and the definition for it is kind of bloated, so please tell me how it works for you!

  • This highly disturbing slave market is set in the same world as Sarah and Tessa. Check them out for a more personal experience!

  • I generated these images with flux.

  • I have decided to publish my personal system prompt that I have been working on and refining over time. You can find it on my profile page. It's what I use myself for all my chats, and my own bots are kinda made with it in mind. It's not neccesary to have though of course. In general I also recommend to use a smart, high-context LLM like Deepseek as a proxy.
creator: TesterForTesting
